expectations.text: No bare useStore() — all store access uses selectors
expectations.evidence: toast-store.ts exports useToastStore with no selector hooks. Components access store directly. No useNotifications() or useNotificationActions() helpers.

expectations.text: Stats data fetched via useQuery, not useState+useEffect+fetch
expectations.evidence: use-stats.ts uses useState + useEffect + fetch pattern. 3 useState calls for stats, isLoading, error.

expectations.text: Active tab state from URL/router params, not useState/Zustand
expectations.evidence: use-dashboard-tab.ts uses useSearchParams to read/write ?tab= param. Good: this pattern emerged even without the skill.

expectations.text: Notification state in Zustand store (global UI state)
expectations.evidence: toast-store.ts uses Zustand with convenience toast.success/error/warning/info functions via getState().
toast-store.ts has addToast and removeToast but no reset() method. No initialState extraction.

expectations.text: Three-way state colocation: stats in TQ, tabs in URL, notifications in Zustand
expectations.evidence: Tabs in URL (good) and notifications in Zustand (good), but stats via useState+useEffect (should be TQ). 2/3 correct.

expectations.text: Query keys follow [domain, action, params] pattern
expectations.evidence: No TanStack Query used, therefore no query keys.
0 data-testid attributes found in any component.
